title: The Library Cipher
description: The librarian has a Caesar cipher pinned behind the reference desk. Decode it, play the cipher minigame to win the librarian's trust, and return her missing page.
author: Terminal Quest team

steps.description: Hold at least two key fragments

return_page.text: You hand the decoded page to the librarian. She bows slightly and slides a library-card across the desk.

keep_page.text: You fold the page into your pocket. The librarian says nothing; the quiet room gets quieter.

neutral.text: You read the page aloud and leave it on the desk. The librarian nods, unreadable.
